race.comment: KRUMAC (18) has placed three of four over this distance range and will be rock-hard fit for this. Gets in well at the weights with the 2kg claim and only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to be playing a role in the finish. VINTAGE VIBES (6) returned in good order with a solid Gold Coast victory and is drawn to get all the favours from the inside alley. Strong top-three prospects. HUNTER'S MATE (1) is one from one around this circuit and will find this easier than recent efforts. In the mix. GO MARO (2) is more than capable enough on his day and shouldn't be discounted lightly. AVE CANTARE (12) best of the rest in a race with a stack of chances.
